ogTitle: St Georges Basin vs St Huberts Island: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in St Georges Basin and St Huberts Island.
heading: St Georges Basin vs St Huberts Island — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between St Georges Basin, New South Wales and St Huberts Island, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: St Georges Basin has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to St Huberts Island (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is St Georges Basin or St Huberts Island safer from flooding?
faq.answer: St Georges Basin has a flood risk score of 24/100, while St Huberts Island scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: St Georges Basin scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. St Huberts Island scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in St Georges Basin or St Huberts Island?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. St Georges Basin has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
